main.name: Omo, Queen of Vesuva
main.oracle_text:
Whenever Omo enters or attacks, put an everything counter on each of up to one target land and up to one target creature.
Each land with an everything counter on it is every land type in addition to its other types.
Each nonland creature with an everything counter on it is every creature type.

card.name: Fabled Passage
card.oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Then if you control four or more lands, untap that land.
card.flavor_text: From here, the path to anywhere may be found.

card.name: Feline Sovereign
card.oracle_text:
Other Cats you control get +1/+1 and have protection from Dogs.
Whenever one or more Cats you control deal combat damage to a player, destroy up to one target artifact or enchantment that player controls.
card.flavor_text: Dogs beg. Cats lay claim.

card.name: Sublime Epiphany
card.oracle_text:
Choose one or more —
• Counter target spell.
• Counter target activated or triggered ability.
• Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.
• Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control.
• Target player draws a card.

card.name: Elvish Champion
card.oracle_text: Other Elf creatures get +1/+1 and have forestwalk. (They can't be blocked as long as defending player controls a Forest.)
card.flavor_text:
"For what are leaves but countless blades
To fight a countless foe on high."
—Skyshroud hymn

card.name: Azami, Lady of Scrolls
card.oracle_text: Tap an untapped Wizard you control: Draw a card.
card.flavor_text:
"Choices belong to those with the luxuries of time and distance. We have neither. I recommend we proceed with the plan to destroy all shrines of the kami."
—Lady Azami, letter to Sensei Hisoka

card.name: Seshiro the Anointed
card.oracle_text:
Other Snake creatures you control get +2/+2.
Whenever a Snake you control deals combat damage to a player, you may draw a card.
card.flavor_text: His family was the first to reach out to the human monks. He soon knew as many koans as he did blade strikes.

card.name: Breeding Pool
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {G} or {U}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.
card.flavor_text:
"One beginning, many paths."
—Vannifar

card.name: Scavenger Grounds
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice a Desert: Exile all graveyards.
card.flavor_text: When the last scrap of flesh is scoured away, the Curse of Wandering ends. Then the dead may sleep.

card.name: Diffusion Sliver
card.oracle_text: Whenever a Sliver creature you control becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter that spell or ability unless its controller pays {2}.
card.flavor_text:
"The hive shimmered, and its walls seemed a living mirror."
—Hastric, Thunian scout

card.name: Polymorphist's Jest
card.oracle_text: Until end of turn, each creature target player controls loses all abilities and becomes a blue Frog with base power and toughness 1/1.
card.flavor_text:
"The flies were bothering me."
—Jalira, master polymorphist

card.name: Glimmerpost
card.oracle_text:
When this land enters, you gain 1 life for each Locus on the battlefield.
{T}: Add {C}.
card.flavor_text: What once spied upon Mirrodin from above now waits below for another to assume control.

card.name: Myr Galvanizer
card.oracle_text:
Other Myr creatures you control get +1/+1.
{1}, {T}: Untap each other Myr you control.
card.flavor_text:
"We can't quite determine what they're doing, but they seem to be doing it quite well."
—Vedalken research notes

card.name: Skyshroud Claim
card.oracle_text: Search your library for up to two Forest cards, put them onto the battlefield, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text: The forest's constant struggle is to keep the spreading flowstone at bay.

card.name: Winged Sliver
card.oracle_text: All Sliver creatures have flying.
card.flavor_text:
"Everything around here has cut a deal with gravity."
—Gerrard of the *Weatherlight*

card.name: Lord of Atlantis
card.oracle_text: Other Merfolk get +1/+1 and have islandwalk. (They can't be blocked as long as defending player controls an Island.)

card.name: Lord of Atlantis
card.oracle_text: Other Merfolk get +1/+1 and have islandwalk. (They can't be blocked as long as defending player controls an Island.)

card.name: Griffin Canyon
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Untap target Griffin. If it's a creature, it gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
card.flavor_text:
"Where are falling feathers deadlier than falling rock?"
—*The One Thousand Questions*

card.name: Pull from Tomorrow
card.oracle_text: Draw X cards, then discard a card.
card.flavor_text:
"I do things in my own time."
—Etha, initiate of Rhet crop

card.name: Pheres-Band Warchief
card.oracle_text:
Vigilance, trample
Other Centaur creatures you control get +1/+1 and have vigilance and trample.
card.flavor_text: The renowned warchiefs of Pheres Band fight with the might of minotaurs and the sagacity of sphinxes.

card.name: Fog
card.oracle_text: Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt this turn.
card.flavor_text: It's hard enough to find your way through uncharted wilderness when you can see the tip of your nose.

card.name: Lord of the Unreal
card.oracle_text: Illusion creatures you control get +1/+1 and have hexproof. (They can't be the targets of spells or abilities your opponents control.)
card.flavor_text: "The dream does not end until I say so."

card.name: Merrow Commerce
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of your end step, untap all Merfolk you control.
card.flavor_text: Schools meet and mingle on Lorwyn's riverways. In the bustling interplay, the merrow renew their sense of community as they sharpen their wits and hone their trading skills.

card.name: Scion of Oona
card.oracle_text:
Flash
Flying
Other Faerie creatures you control get +1/+1.
Other Faeries you control have shroud. (They can't be the targets of spells or abilities.)

card.name: Timber Protector
card.oracle_text:
Other Treefolk creatures you control get +1/+1.
Other Treefolk and Forests you control have indestructible.
card.flavor_text: In his presence, an ordinary grove becomes a bastion to turn spells and break armies.

card.name: Priest of Titania
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add {G} for each Elf on the battlefield.
card.flavor_text: Titania rewards all those who honor the forest by making them a living part of it.

card.name: Swarmyard
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Regenerate target Insect, Rat, Spider, or Squirrel. (The next time it would be destroyed this turn, instead tap it, remove it from combat, and heal all damage on it.)
card.flavor_text: Where scavengers nest in hollowed-out rib cages and chittering crawlers peer from empty eye sockets, few dare to trespass.

card.name: Harabaz Druid
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add X mana of any one color, where X is the number of Allies you control.
card.flavor_text: "I care nothing for treasure. The land beckons me, and I cannot rest until my feet have touched every inch of it."

card.name: Galerider Sliver
card.oracle_text: Sliver creatures you control have flying.
card.flavor_text: Masters of adaptation, galeriders serve multiple purposes useful to the hive. When they're not patrolling their territories, their majestic wings serve to circulate cool air through the vast hive chambers.

card.name: Mutavault
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{1}: This land becomes a 2/2 creature with all creature types until end of turn. It's still a land.
card.flavor_text: Some worlds possess a hidden core where life's essence constantly surges.

card.name: Megantic Sliver
card.oracle_text: Sliver creatures you control get +3/+3.
card.flavor_text: Even the thrums, the lowliest of slivers, become deadly in its presence.

card.name: Whelming Wave
card.oracle_text: Return all creatures to their owners' hands except for Krakens, Leviathans, Octopuses, and Serpents.
card.flavor_text:
"I can see why this appeals to Thassa."
—Kiora

card.name: Seafloor Oracle
card.oracle_text: Whenever a Merfolk you control deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.
card.flavor_text: Where the light falls dim and blue on broken ships, secrets lie unclaimed.

card.name: Tendershoot Dryad
card.oracle_text:
Ascend (If you control ten or more permanents, you get the city's blessing for the rest of the game.)
At the beginning of each upkeep, create a 1/1 green Saproling creature token.
Saprolings you control get +2/+2 as long as you have the city's blessing.

card.name: Kindred Discovery
card.oracle_text:
As this enchantment enters, choose a creature type.
Whenever a creature you control of the chosen type enters or attacks, draw a card.
card.flavor_text: Few things are truly "lost" at sea.

card.name: Path of Ancestry
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity. When that mana is spent to cast a creature spell that shares a creature type with your commander, scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)

card.name: Swan Song
card.oracle_text: Counter target enchantment, instant, or sorcery spell. Its controller creates a 2/2 blue Bird creature token with flying.
card.flavor_text:
"The most enlightened mages create beauty from violence."
—Medomai the Ageless

card.name: Master of the Pearl Trident
card.oracle_text: Other Merfolk creatures you control get +1/+1 and have islandwalk. (They can't be blocked as long as defending player controls an Island.)
card.flavor_text: "Let the land dwellers know the coast is no longer the border between our realms. A new age of empire has begun."

card.name: Full Moon's Rise
card.oracle_text:
Werewolf creatures you control get +1/+0 and have trample.
Sacrifice this enchantment: Regenerate all Werewolf creatures you control.
card.flavor_text: Some lycanthropes wish they could abandon their weak human shapes and revel in the power of the wolf.

card.name: Command Tower
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
card.flavor_text: When defeat is near and guidance is scarce, all eyes look in one direction.

card.name: Misty Rainforest
card.oracle_text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Forest or Island card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Sea Gate Loremaster
card.oracle_text: {T}: Draw a card for each Ally you control.
card.flavor_text:
"He's a living library. He remembers everything our band of explorers has seen, and we can use that to our advantage."
—Zahr Gada, Halimar expedition leader

card.name: Flooded Grove
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{G/U}, {T}: Add {G}{G}, {G}{U}, or {U}{U}.
card.flavor_text: At full moon, the river seeps over its banks and crawls through the woods like a blanket of serpents.

card.name: Cloudpost
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {C} for each Locus on the battlefield.
card.flavor_text:
"He watches from above. He watches from below. He watches from within."
—Inscription on Tel-Jilad, the Tree of Tales

card.name: Deserted Temple
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{1}, {T}: Untap target land.
card.flavor_text: A monument to long-forgotten gods, it stands as a tribute to the fleeting nature of human ways.

card.name: Rejuvenating Springs
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you have two or more opponents.
{T}: Add {G} or {U}.
card.flavor_text: When they're done pummeling each other, the fighters relax companionably in the springs, warming their sore muscles.

card_faces.oracle_text: You may have this creature enter as a copy of a creature you control, except it's a Shapeshifter Rogue in addition to its other types.
card_faces.flavor_text:
"When I touched the Glasspool, I tasted infinite possibility."

card_faces.name: Glasspool Shore
card_faces.flavor_text:
"Past and possibility come together in the vastness of infinite reflection."
—Ashen Wal, Akoum Expeditionary House

This creature can't be blocked if you had another Cleric, Rogue, Warrior, or Wizard enter the battlefield under your control this turn.

card_faces.name: Barkchannel Pathway

—Inga Rune-Eyes

card_faces.name: Tidechannel Pathway
card_faces.flavor_text:
"Trust in the path, and it will bear you to safety."
—Inga Rune-Eyes

card.flavor_text:

card.name: Yavimaya, Cradle of Growth

card.flavor_text:

Deathtouch
{T}: Conjure a card named Forest onto the battlefield. Activate only if two or more Elf cards are in your graveyard.

tokens.name: Maskwood Nexus
tokens.oracle_text:
Creatures you control are every creature type. The same is true for creature spells you control and creature cards you own that aren't on the battlefield.
{3}, {T}: Create a 2/2 blue Shapeshifter creature token with changeling. (It is every creature type.)

tokens.name: Mutable Explorer
tokens.oracle_text:
Changeling (This card is every creature type.)
When this creature enters, create a tapped Mutavault token. (It's a land with "{T}: Add {C}" and "{1}: This token becomes a 2/2 creature with all creature types until end of turn. It's still a land.")

tokens.name: Mutable Explorer
tokens.oracle_text:
Changeling (This card is every creature type.)
When this creature enters, create a tapped Mutavault token. (It's a land with "{T}: Add {C}" and "{1}: This token becomes a 2/2 creature with all creature types until end of turn. It's still a land.")
tokens.flavor_text:
"It had been to warrens and kithkin taverns, but found a home in the hidden cavern."
*—The Changeling's Search*

tokens.name: Mutavault
tokens.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{1}: This token becomes a 2/2 creature with all creature types until end of turn. It's still a land.

tokens.name: Mystic Reflection
tokens.oracle_text:
Choose target nonlegendary creature. The next time one or more creatures or planeswalkers enter this turn, they enter as copies of the chosen creature.
Foretell {U} (During your turn, you may pay {2} and exile this card from your hand face down. Cast it on a later turn for its foretell cost.)

tokens.name: Season of Weaving
tokens.oracle_text:
Choose up to five {P} worth of modes. You may choose the same mode more than once.
{P} — Draw a card.
{P}{P} — Choose an artifact or creature you control. Create a token that's a copy of it.
{P}{P}{P} — Return each nonland, nontoken permanent to its owner's hand.

tokens.name: Shapeshifter
tokens.oracle_text: Changeling (This token is every creature type.)

tokens.name: Spawning Kraken
tokens.oracle_text: Whenever a Kraken, Leviathan, Octopus, or Serpent you control deals combat damage to a player, create a 9/9 blue Kraken creature token.

tokens.name: Sublime Epiphany
tokens.oracle_text:
Choose one or more —
• Counter target spell.
• Counter target activated or triggered ability.
• Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.
• Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control.
• Target player draws a card.

tokens.name: Tome of the Infinite
tokens.oracle_text: {U}, {T}: Conjure a random card from Tome of the Infinite's spellbook into your hand. It perpetually gains "You may spend mana as though it were mana of any color to cast this spell."

tokens.name: Tower Winder
tokens.oracle_text:
Reach, deathtouch
When this creature enters, search your library and/or graveyard for a card named Command Tower, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle.
tokens.flavor_text: The tower guards eventually gave up, figuring it was better at the job anyway.

tokens.name: Urza's Construction Drone
tokens.oracle_text:
When Urza's Construction Drone enters, conjure cards named Urza's Mine, Urza's Power Plant, and Urza's Tower into your library, then shuffle.
Whenever Urza's Construction Drone attacks or dies, seek an Urza's land card.

tokens.name: Urza's Mine
tokens.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}. If you control an Urza's Power-Plant and an Urza's Tower, add {C}{C} instead.
tokens.flavor_text: In his hunger for power and knowledge, Urza dug deep into Dominaria's ancient past.

tokens.name: Urza's Power Plant
tokens.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}. If you control an Urza's Mine and an Urza's Tower, add {C}{C} instead.
tokens.flavor_text: Urza threw himself into his research, pushing the boundaries of both possibility and morality.

tokens.name: Urza's Tower
tokens.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}. If you control an Urza's Mine and an Urza's Power-Plant, add {C}{C}{C} instead.
tokens.flavor_text: Urza studied the creations of the Thran not simply to learn from them, but to surpass them.
